title: Cultivation Alliance
content:
Cultivation Alliance
 is the administrative body of the 
Brilliant Void Star System
. Its position in Brilliant Void is similar to the 
Thunder Celestial Temple
's position in the 
Allheaven Star System
.

Appearance
[
]

It is a giant cultivation planet with countless smaller planets surrounding it. A monstrous blood light is constantly emitted from below the planet. There is spatial rift below the cultivation planet and the blood light is coming from that rift.

Background
[
]

Long ago, Cultivation Alliance barely managed to defeat the 
Four Divine Sect
 for the position of overlord of the Brilliant Void Star System. They only managed to do this due to:

News of the Vermillion Bird Divine Emperor, 
Lu Yun
, facing his third 
Heaven's Blight
 being leaked.

Azure Dragon Divine Emperor
 disappearance.

Black Turtle Divine Emperor
 turning traitor and attacking Vermillion Bird Divine Emperor before escaping.

Brilliant Void Cultivation Sect
 attacking in full-force, breaking its agreement of only indirectly participating.

History
[
]

After Lu Yun saved Wang Lin and killed the Celestials that came to kill Qing Lin, news of the Alliance's miserable defeat spread across the entire Star System.

Most of the sects and clans located in Brilliant Void declared independence. This includes 
Corpse Sect
 which took the entire southern region of the star system as their territory. Also, Four Divine Sect took the eastern region of the star system as their territory.

Moreover, the most of the Alliance's Rank 7 Cultivation planets and all four of the the Alliance's Rank 8 Cultivation planets that included 
Country of Rising Cloud
, 
Country of Reed Flute
, 
Temple of Heaven
, and 
Evil Earth Sect
 declared their independence.

Finally, after two years, the Alliance's HQ opened and declared that all the "independent sects" that resist Allheaven for 60 years will be spared of any punishment and they will be allowed to enter the Elder Council. Also, the Alliance sent out a kill order for 
Wang Lin
.
